title: Xtra Spicy Gooey German Cheese Quesadilla
description: A spicy, gooey, midnight-craving German dish featuring graham cracker crumbs, wrapped in a pandan leaf, and perfect for plant-based diets.
instructions: Combine graham cracker crumbs, nutritional yeast, paprika, salt, and black pepper in a bowl.
S�ut onions and bell peppers in a pan with a little water until softened.
Add jalape0 pepper, cayenne pepper, and a splash of apple cider vinegar to the pan and cook for 1 minute.
In a blender, blend together cashew cheese, water, and a pinch of salt until smooth.
Transfer the cheese mixture to the pan and stir until combined with the onion and bell pepper mixture.
Place a pandan leaf wrap on a flat surface and spoon the cheese mixture onto one half of the wrap.
Sprinkle more graham cracker crumbs on top of the cheese mixture.
Fold the other half of the wrap over the filling and press the edges together to seal the quesadilla.
Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat and place the quesadilla inside.
Cook for 2-3 minutes or until the wrap is crispy and the cheese is melted.
Flip the quesadilla and cook for another 2-3 minutes or until the other side is crispy and the cheese is melted.
Repeat with the remaining ingredients to make more quesadillas.
